hero_arabic_trans: No soul knows what it will earn tomorrow — (Quran 31:34)
hero_sub: Open your personal Islamic dashboard with prayer rhythm, reflection, and meaningful insight.
hero_quote: And never think that Allah is unaware of what the wrongdoers do.
input_title: Let's start with your birth details
input_sub: This helps us build your personal dashboard.
input_err_dob: Please select your date of birth.
input_err_future: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
section_world: THE WORLD WHEN YOU WERE BORN
glance_days_desc: A journey of meaning given to you.
glance_sleep_desc: About one third of your life.
glance_sunsets_desc: You've seen thousands of beautiful sunsets.
reflect_days: You have counted {days} days. How many of them brought you closer to Allah?
reflect_hours: That is {hours} hours of life. How many were spent in a way you'd be proud of on the Day of Judgment?
reflect_sleep: You have slept approximately {sleep} years. Did your rest give you strength for ibadah — or only for dunya?
reflect_hearts: Your heart has beaten {hearts} billion times without stopping. How many of those beats remembered the One who keeps it beating?
reflect_sunsets: You have witnessed {sunsets} sunsets — each one a sign of Allah. Did you ever stop to say Alhamdulillah for even one?
reflect_seconds: {seconds} million seconds of life. Each one recorded. Each one will be asked about.
world_moment_text: The world was different, but your journey had just begun.
journey_completed: You have completed {pct}% of your estimated life journey.
journey_note: Based on average lifespan of 75 years
reflection_body: Every moment you have experienced is part of your dashboard. Make the rest meaningful.
truth_intro: You have spent {years} years. Here is where that time actually went — based on global averages.
story_closing: Your journey is still being written. ✦
share_sub: Create and share your personal Islamic dashboard with your loved ones.
share_tagline: A dashboard for your daily faith.
tracker_sub: Track your daily عبادات — saved on your device, private to you.
qibla_note: Uses your device location. Nothing is stored or sent anywhere.
qibla_note_saved: Showing your last saved Qibla direction.
qibla_note_found: Face the direction shown. Allahu Akbar.
qibla_body: The Qibla is the direction of the Masjid al-Haram in Makkah — the direction Muslims face during Salah.
qibla_ayah_tr: "Turn your face toward the Sacred Mosque." — (Quran 2:144)
liveage_sub_empty: Enter your date of birth above to see your live age.
liveage_sub_active: Every second counts. Your age, live.
bday_sub_empty: Enter your DOB to see your birthday countdown.
bday_today_sub: Alhamdulillah — may Allah bless your year ahead. 🤲
footer_tagline: A dashboard for your faith. A guide for your day.
footer_made: Made with ♥ for a meaningful life
mirror_questions: What did you do yesterday that will matter in your akhirah?
If your life ended today — are you ready to meet Allah?
You have time right now. But not unlimited time. What will you do with today?
When did you last cry out of fear or love of Allah?
Is the person you are today the person you want to be remembered as?
How many of your daily habits are building your akhirah — and how many are only building your dunya?
If Allah showed you a recording of your last 7 days — would you be at peace with what you see?
Who in your life needs your kindness right now — and are you giving it to them?
Are you closer to Allah today than you were one year ago?
What is the one thing you keep delaying for your deen — and why?
Your parents will not be here forever. Have you honored them today?
The Quran is the word of Allah. When did you last sit with it — not to finish it, but to feel it?
You will stand before Allah alone. No one will speak for you. Are you preparing for that moment?
What would you change about your life if you knew you had only 30 days left?
Is your heart at peace right now? If not — what is standing between you and Allah?
